hotel.des: {"amenities":"Take in the views from a garden and make use of amenities such as complimentary wireless internet access and tour/ticket assistance.","spoken_languages":"Hindi, Arabic, English, Urdu","rooms":"Make yourself at home in one of the 25 air-conditioned guestrooms.
